records.question: Which festivals named Flower Awards took place in 2007 in the United States with Charles Coody as chair, had at least 155 attendees, and won nominations?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT festival_detail.festival_id FROM festival_detail
JOIN nomination ON festival_detail.festival_id = nomination.festival_id
WHERE festival_detail.num_of_audience >= 155 AND festival_detail.location = 'United States' AND nomination.result = 'Won' AND festival_detail.year = 2007 AND festival_detail.chair_name = 'Charles Coody' AND festival_detail.festival_name = 'Flower Awards'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT f.Festival_ID
FROM festival_detail f
JOIN nomination n ON f.Festival_ID = n.Festival_ID
WHERE f.Festival_Name = 'Flower Awards'
  AND f.Year = 2007
  AND f.Location = 'United States'
  AND f.Chair_Name = 'Charles Coody'
  AND f.Num_of_Audience >= 155
  AND n.Result = 'Won'

records.question: Which festivals named Flower Awards in the United States, chaired by Charles Coody, had at most 155 attendees and featured the nominated Program Music/Variety Show Indonesian Idol?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT festival_detail.festival_id FROM festival_detail
JOIN nomination ON festival_detail.festival_id = nomination.festival_id
JOIN artwork ON nomination.artwork_id = artwork.artwork_id
WHERE nomination.result = 'Nominated' AND artwork.type = 'Program Music/Variety Show' AND festival_detail.location = 'United States' AND artwork.name = 'Indonesian Idol' AND festival_detail.num_of_audience <= 155 AND festival_detail.chair_name = 'Charles Coody' AND festival_detail.festival_name = 'Flower Awards'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT fd.Festival_ID
FROM festival_detail fd
JOIN nomination n ON fd.Festival_ID = n.Festival_ID
JOIN artwork a ON n.Artwork_ID = a.Artwork_ID
WHERE fd.Festival_Name = 'Flower Awards'
AND fd.Location = 'United States'
AND fd.Chair_Name = 'Charles Coody'
AND fd.Num_of_Audience <= 155
AND a.Type = 'Program Music/Variety Show'
AND a.Name = 'Indonesian Idol'

records.question: Which festivals held in the United States since 2007 had Doug Ford as chair and attracted at least 160 audience members?

records.question: What festivals have been chaired by Lucy Lu since 2010 or later?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT festival_detail.festival_id FROM festival_detail
WHERE festival_detail.year >= 2010 AND festival_detail.chair_name = 'Lucy Lu'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Festival_ID FROM festival_detail WHERE Chair_Name = 'Lucy Lu' AND Year >= 2010

records.question: What festivals held in the United States took place in 2006 or earlier and had nominations?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT festival_detail.festival_id FROM festival_detail
JOIN nomination ON festival_detail.festival_id = nomination.festival_id
WHERE festival_detail.year <= 2006 AND festival_detail.location = 'United States'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT f.Festival_ID
FROM festival_detail f
JOIN nomination n ON f.Festival_ID = n.Festival_ID
WHERE f.Location = 'United States' AND f.Year <= 2006
